Gian Luca
Buoncompagni

Curriculum Vitae

  • Milan, Italy
  • +39 339 7794186

    linkedin.com/in/gbuoncompagni
    github.com/gbuonc

Engineering Manager and front-end specialist with more than 20 years of experience in building and scaling SaaS platforms. Strong in bridging business needs and technical execution, collaborating with internal and external stakeholders to deliver complex, feature-rich applications.

Expert in frontend architecture, micro-frontends, and high-performance interfaces, with experience contributing to product evolution and roadmap definition in multi-tenant environments.

Core Skills

Frontend Architecture & Engineering

Micro-frontends with module federation, scalable multi-tenant SaaS architectures, design systems

Product & Strategy

Feature ownership, stakeholder collaboration, requirements definition, roadmap and platform evolution

Tech Stack

TypeScript, JavaScript, NextJs, React and Vuejs ecosystem

Design Systems:

Shadcn/UI, Tailwind CSS, Chakra UI, Material UI, Emotion, css-in-js

3D Technologies

Threejs, React Three Fiber, WebGL, Drei, WebGL

Tooling & DevOps

Nx, Webpack 5, Vite, Azure DevOps, Cloudflare

Testing & Quality

Jest, Cypress, Playwright, Sentry

AI

Generative AI integration, agentic workflows

Agile methodologies

Scrum, Kanban

Professional experiences

December 2020 - Present

Head of front end and Platform Integration at Tailoor Spa

  • Led the frontend architecture and development teams for a multi-tenant e-commerce SaaS platform
  • Translated business requirements into scalable technical solutions
  • Collaborated with product, sales, and operations to define features and support roadmap
  • Designed a micro-frontend ecosystem enabling modular product evolution
  • Delivered advanced web-based 3D configurators
  • Defined integration strategy via APIs and web components
  • Contributed to AI-driven features and agentic workflows
  • Participation in international technological and commercial exhibitions

September 2018 - December 2020

Head of front end at Vivaticket Spa

  • Led frontend development for an international B2C platform
  • Collaborated with product stakeholders on features and content tools
  • Coordinated international teams and legacy integrations

May 2014 - August 2018

Senior front end developer at Editoriale Il Fatto Spa

  • Developed and optimized the currently online national news platform ilfattoquotidiano.it (averaging 1.6M daily views)
  • Contributed to product features, ADV integrations, monetization and special projects

Earlier Experiences (2000 - 2014)

  • Senior Frontend Developer at Zodiak Active Srl, working on international projects with brands like Ferrero, Lavazza, Ferrari
  • Frontend Developer / Multimedia Specialist (Fullsix SpA and others)

Curriculum Vitae

SELECTED HIGHLIGHTS

  • Built micro-frontend architecture for a multi-tenant SaaS platform

Education

  • Degree in Public Relations (110/110 cum laude) - IULM University, Milan
  • Postgraduate Course in Web Project Management - Genesio Institute, Milan
  • Online program certificate "Future of Technology: Trends, Strategies, and Innovation Opportunities", UC Berkeley Executive Education

Languages

Italian (Native), English (Professional), German (Basic)

Awards

  • Web Rockit 2002 Award for www.jntplus.com (now offline)
  • Mediastars 2005 Award (cat. e-commerce) for www.unopiu.it

Interests and extra work activities

  • Music: amateur musician and bass player with several albums released
  • Woodworking: musical instruments, DIY furniture, object design
  • River sports (Italian whitewater canoe champion in 1992)
  • AVIS blood donor since 1994
